case.title: CAMPBELL v. WASHINGTON STATE BAR ASSN.

opinion.h1: CAMPBELL v. WASHINGTON STATE BAR ASSN., 394 U.S. 323 (1969)
opinion.h4: CAMPBELL v. WASHINGTON STATE BAR ASSN. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF WASHINGTON. No. 1324, Misc. Decided March 24, 1969.
opinion.p: 74 Wash. 2d 276, 444 P.2d 784, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
